rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Motion For Reconsideration Re Order Of July 10 2020 Allowing Receiver To List And Market Receivership Properties For Sale Prior To Foreclosure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 24, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANTS ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, CHRISTINE MWANGI'S Motion For Reconsideration Re Order Of July 10 2020 Allowing Receiver To List And Market Receivership Properties For Sale Prior To Foreclosure Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person (a good faith reason for personal appearance is required) for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Dept501Orders@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. The e-mail addresses provided herein shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Defendant's Motion for Reconsideration is DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE ET AL VS. CITIBANK , N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Of Citibank, N.A.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 24, 2020 line Defendant's Motion for Protective Order Of Citibank, N.A. continued to September 30, 2020. On July 23, 2020 the Court requested that courtesy copies of "all filing in support of and in opposition to this motion" be delivered to the department. Only moving party's filings have been delivered. By no later than August 28, 2020 courtesy copies of opposition to be provided to the Court with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)
